zh.lifeSummary: 當William Brereton於1351年2月14日出生在英國爾艾格頓時，他的父親William Brereton25歲，母親Ellen Helena Egerton26歲。他於1386年與Anyll de Venables在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1426年1月10日在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Brereton于1351年2月14日出生在英国爾艾格頓时，他的父亲William Brereton25岁，母亲Ellen Helena Egerton26岁。他于1386年与Anyll de Venables在英国英格兰斯塔福爾奧德利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1426年1月10日在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Brereton was born on 14 February 1351, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, his father, William Brereton, was 25 and his mother, Ellen Helena Egerton, was 26. He married Anyll de Venables in 1386, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 10 January 1426, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, at the age of 74.

Il a épousé Anyll de Venables en 1386, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1426, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

Ele casou-se com Anyll de Venables em 1386, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Brereton родился 14 февраля 1351 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Brereton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Helena Egerton, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Anyll de Venables в 1386 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 10 января 1426 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.
